{{Quote|Maeltorp Intimidator: Who needs guns when you have 0.5 meter thick armor and a duranium drill?|[[BlastBoast 2000]] advertisement|<ref name="Enemies for Life">{{JournalCite|4|Enemies for Life}}</ref>}}
The '''Maeltorp Intimidator''' was a modified Maeltorp Cargorunner which was equipped with thick armor and a [[Drill/Legends|mining drill]]. It was one of the three permitted vehicles in the violent demolition race known as [[BlastBoast 2000]]. It was available for rental for contestants in the race.<ref name="Enemies for Life" />
